description: Green Goods Claude Code hooks v3.1 - Enhanced security validation
_security_notes: All hook commands use pattern matching on Claude-provided variables ($TOOL_INPUT, $FILE_PATH)
These variables are sanitized by Claude Code before being passed to hooks
Commands use grep for pattern matching - no eval, no dynamic code execution
All patterns are anchored and specific to prevent false positives

hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'packages/(client|admin)/src/hooks/'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: All hooks must be in packages/shared/src/hooks/ - see CLAUDE.md' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'packages/[^/]+/\.env'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: Package-level .env files not allowed. Use root .env only.' >&2; exit 2; fi

PreToolUse._description: TDD enforcement - check test file exists

hooks.command: SRC=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE 'packages/(shared|client|admin)/src/[^"]+\.(ts|tsx)' | head -1); if [ -n "$SRC" ] && ! echo "$SRC" | grep -qE '(__tests__|\.(test|spec)\.)'; then TEST_PATH=$(echo "$SRC" | sed 's|/src/|/src/__tests__/|' | sed 's/\.[^.]*$/.test&/'); if [ ! -f "$TEST_PATH" ]; then echo "🧪 TDD CHECK: No test found. Expected: $TEST_PATH"; fi; fi || true
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'packages/contracts/config/schemas.json'; then echo '⚠️ WARNING: schemas.json is read-only. Use --update-schemas via deploy.ts or create schemas.test.json'; fi

PreToolUse._security: Pattern detection for production deployments - warns but allows

hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'deploy.*mainnet|upgrade.*mainnet|vercel.*--prod'; then echo '🚨 PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT - Requires explicit user confirmation before proceeding'; fi

PreToolUse._security: Hard block on dangerous git operations

hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git.*push.*--force.*(main|master)'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: Never force push to main/master' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then echo '📋 PRE-COMMIT: Run validation first: bun format && bun lint && bun test && bun build'; fi

if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(hooks/|stores/|providers/|modules/|types/|workflows/)[^_].*\.(ts|tsx)$'; then echo '🏗️ ARCHITECTURE FILE: Review the 13 architectural rules in CLAUDE.md before editing (timers, listeners, async, errors, types, selectors, query keys, forms, useMemo, context, imports, logging, providers)'; fi
if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$'; then echo '📝 REMINDER: Add i18n keys to en.json, es.json, pt.json for any new UI strings'; fi

if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && ! echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(__tests__|\.(test|spec)\.)' && grep -q '0x[a-fA-F0-9]\{40\}' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠️ WARNING: Hardcoded address detected. Use deployment artifacts from packages/contracts/deployments/'; fi || true

if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'packages/(shared|client|admin)/src/[^_].*\.(ts|tsx)$' && ! echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q '__tests__'; then echo '🧪 TDD REQUIRED: Write failing test first at __tests__/, then implement. RED → GREEN → REFACTOR'; fi
if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'packages/contracts/src/.*\.sol$'; then echo '🔨 CONTRACT CHANGED: Run `bun --filter contracts build` to update ABIs'; fi

PostToolUse._description: Contract test reminder when editing Solidity

hooks.command: if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'packages/contracts/src/.*\.sol$'; then echo '🧪 CONTRACT CHANGED: Run tests with `cd packages/contracts && bun test` before committing'; fi

PostToolUse._description: Indexer schema reminder when contract events change

hooks.command: if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'packages/contracts/src/.*\.sol$' && echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'event\s+[A-Z]'; then echo '📊 EVENT CHANGED: Consider updating packages/indexer/schema.graphql and EventHandlers.ts'; fi || true

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'from.*@green-goods/shared/(hooks|stores|providers|modules|utils|types)/'; then echo '⚠️ WARNING: Use barrel import from @green-goods/shared, not deep paths'; fi || true

PostToolUse._description: Warn on console.log in production code

hooks.command: if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'packages/(shared|client|admin)/src/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' && ! echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q '__tests__' && echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'console\.(log|warn|error)'; then echo '⚠️ WARNING: Use logger service instead of console.log in production code'; fi || true

printf '%s\n' '🌿 Green Goods Claude Code' '├─ /plan    → Plan features with specs' '├─ /debug   → Investigate bugs' '├─ /review  → 6-pass code review' '├─ /audit   → Codebase health check' '└─ Agents: "use oracle" (research) | "use cracked-coder" (implement)'

PKG=$(pwd | grep -oE 'packages/[^/]+' | head -1 | cut -d/ -f2); if [ -n "$PKG" ] && [ -f ".claude/context/$PKG.md" ]; then echo "📁 CONTEXT: Working in packages/$PKG — Read .claude/context/$PKG.md for package-specific patterns"; fi

SubagentStart._description: cracked-coder protocol reminder with Cathedral Check

hooks.command: echo '🔧 cracked-coder: TDD mandatory. GATHER → PLAN (🏛️ Cathedral Check) → TEST → IMPLEMENT → VERIFY'
echo '🔍 code-reviewer: Follow 6-pass protocol, post findings to GitHub.'
echo '🔮 oracle: Use 3+ research paths, provide evidence-based findings.'

SubagentStop._description: Remind about TodoWrite usage on agent completion

hooks.command: echo '📋 AGENT COMPLETE: Verify TodoWrite was used to track progress. All todos should be completed or have clear status.'
